creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
After an upgrade of package net-mgmt/icingaweb2-module-director to icingaweb2-module-director-php82-1.10.2_1, the service icinga-director is unwilling to start, reporting the error:

[...]
root@www:~ # icingacli director daemon run
ERROR: ErrorException in /usr/local/www/icingaweb2/library/Icinga/Application/Platform.php:273 with message: Trying to access array offset on value of type bool
